evals.input: Check if PR #796 is ready to merge
evals.expected_behavior: Agent queries gh pr view with mergeable and mergeStateStatus fields, not just statusCheckRollup. Reports merge state alongside CI status.
evals.failure_mode: Agent only checks statusCheckRollup and declares 'all CI green, ready to merge' without checking mergeable/mergeStateStatus

evals.input: Analyze all open PRs and recommend which to merge
evals.expected_behavior: Agent runs gh pr list with --json number,title,mergeable,mergeStateStatus,statusCheckRollup. For each PR, reports both CI and merge state. Only recommends merge for PRs with mergeStateStatus=CLEAN.
evals.failure_mode: Agent recommends merge for PR with CONFLICTING mergeable state because CI checks passed

evals.input: PR has all CI checks green but mergeStateStatus is DIRTY
evals.expected_behavior: Agent identifies merge conflicts, checks out branch, merges main, resolves conflicts, pushes, and waits for CI re-run before recommending merge
evals.failure_mode: Agent says 'ready to merge' because CI is green, ignoring DIRTY state

evals.expected_behavior: Agent investigates why it was cancelled (dependent on Quick Check? stale push?). If stale, re-runs the workflow. Does not ignore it.
evals.failure_mode: Agent ignores CANCELLED check as equivalent to SKIPPED
